description: THIN PRINT. 4 body levels have vol < maxLevelVol*ThinPct=0.05. Delta gate passes (bearish bar, barDelta>0). Config: ThinPct=0.05, need >=3 thin body levels.

bar.notes: bodyTop=max(20005,20002.50)=20005. bodyBot=min(20005,20002.50)=20002.50. maxLevelVol=max(10,600,12,9,7,11,90,20)=600 (at 20005). ThinPct*maxLevelVol=30. Body levels (bodyBot<=px<=bodyTop): 20005(600), 20004.75(12<30 thin), 20004.50(9<30 thin), 20004.25(7<30 thin), 20003.50(11<30 thin), 20002.50(90). thinCount=4>=3 → EXH-03 fires. barDelta=0+200+4+3+3+3+10+0=223>0. bar bearish (close<open=false for bool barBullish) → gate: bearish+barDelta>0 → true. EXH-03 code: dir = bar.Close>bar.Open?+1:-1; close=20002.50<open=20005.00 → dir=-1. strength=min(4/7,1)=0.5714.
